svg.title: AgentOS System Architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer architecture from top to bottom: API Surface (generateText, streamText, agent, agency, mission), Cognitive Substrate (GMI coordinator with PersonaOverlayManager, SentimentTracker, MetapromptExecutor), Memory and RAG (4-tier memory, 8 cognitive mechanisms, HyDE, GraphRAG, 7 vector backends), Tools and Capabilities (ToolOrchestrator, 100+ extension packs, 88 SKILL.md modules, CapabilityDiscovery, ForgeToolMetaTool), Guardrails and HITL, Orchestration (workflow, mission, AgentGraph, CompiledExecutionGraph, CheckpointStore), and I/O and Providers (voice pipeline, channels, media generation, 21 LLM providers, OpenRouter fanout).
svg.text: Seven cooperating layers · caller-facing API at the top · channels and providers at the floor · cognition + memory + safety in the middle

g.text: High-level helpers — pure functions for one-shot calls, factories for stateful agents
Per-agent coordinator that owns persona, mood, working state, and the per-turn reasoning trace
4-tier cognitive memory with 8 mechanisms · HyDE + GraphRAG retrieval · 70.2% LongMemEval-M
100+ extension packs · 88 curated SKILL.md modules · runtime tool forging with judge-gated approval
Two-phase dispatcher · 4-tier PII redaction · ONNX classifiers · NLI grounding · 5 approval triggers
3 authoring APIs compile to one IR · graph runtime executes every plan · checkpoint + resume across nodes
Voice pipeline · channel adapters · media generation · 21 LLM providers with fallback chains
